dict.string: ATEM IP Patchbay shows a live preview of the selected camera or capture device so you can confirm the right input before pressing Start Stream.
ATEM IP Patchbay enumerates and previews audio input devices so you can pick the right microphone or interface for the outgoing stream.
ATEM IP Patchbay discovers NDI senders and connects to ATEM hardware on your local network.
